examples: The revamp includes replacing the old navy uniform with a crisp blue and white cotton outfit.
He decided to revamp the company's provincial image.
All the country's political parties have accepted that it is time to revamp the system.
Smith's ground-hog revamp is the most radical redesign of FedEx in its 28-year history.
Last month bed numbers dropped temporarily at Bronglais as part of a major revamp.
